items.title: Exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain in middle-aged and older adults: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis of 24 studies (n=1298) found exercise interventions significantly reduce pain and improve function, ROM, and strength in middle-aged and older adults with rotator cuff-related shoulder pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项荟萃分析再次确认运动疗法对于肩袖相关肩痛（RCRSP）是有效的，尤其在中老年患者中。你可以自信地将其作为RCRSP患者的一线干预措施，重点关注疼痛、功能、ROM 和力量的改善。
items.titleZh: 中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的运动干预：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项包含 24 项研究（n=1298）的系统综述和荟萃分析发现，运动干预能显著减轻中老年肩袖相关肩痛患者的疼痛，并改善功能、关节活动度及力量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This meta-analysis reaffirms the effectiveness of exercise interventions for rotator cuff-related shoulder pain (RCRSP), especially in middle-aged and older adults. You can confidently position exercise as a first-line intervention for RCRSP, focusing on improving pain, function, ROM, and strength.

items.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.
items.summary: A retrospective comparative effectiveness cohort study of 34,704 acute stroke patients found that rehabilitation in inpatient rehabilitation facilities (IRFs) was associated with significantly longer home time compared to skilled nursing facilities (SNFs).
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究显示，急性卒中患者在急性后期入住康复医院（IRFs）而非专业护理机构（SNFs）可获得显著更长的居家时间。这意味着，你应积极倡导将符合条件的卒中患者转诊至 IRFs 进行康复，这能带来更好的功能恢复和独立生活能力。
items.titleZh: 利用急性卒中登记数据比较住院康复机构与专业护理机构康复的有效性
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 34,704 名急性卒中患者的回顾性比较有效性队列研究发现，在住院康复机构（IRFs）进行康复与在专业护理机构（SNFs）相比，能显著延长居家时间。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective study shows that acute stroke patients admitted to Inpatient Rehabilitation Facilities (IRFs) rather than Skilled Nursing Facilities (SNFs) post-acutely achieve significantly longer time at home. This means you should actively advocate for referring eligible stroke patients to IRFs for rehabilitation, as it leads to better functional recovery and independent living.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

related.title: THE COMPARATIVE EFFECTIVENESS OF INPATIENT VERSUS SKILLED NURSING FACILITY REHABILITATION USING LINKED ACUTE STROKE REGISTRY DATA.

items.title: Early versus conventional postoperative rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty: a systematic review of functional outcomes and complications.
items.summary: A systematic review comparing early (≤14 days) versus conventional (≥28 days) rehabilitation after reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) found no significant differences in functional outcomes or complication rates.
items.curatedReason: 关于反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后康复时机的系统综述指出，早期康复（≤14 天）与传统康复（≥28 天）在功能结局和并发症方面没有显著差异。这提示你可以根据患者个体情况和术中发现来更灵活地安排术后康复启动时间，不必拘泥于延长制动。
items.titleZh: 反式全肩关节置换术后早期与传统康复的功能结局及并发症系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述比较了反式全肩关节置换术（rTSA）术后早期（≤14 天）与传统（≥28 天）康复，发现在功能结局和并发症方面均无显著差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review on reverse total shoulder arthroplasty (rTSA) post-op rehab timing suggests no significant difference in functional outcomes or complications between early (≤14 days) and conventional (≥28 days) rehabilitation. This allows for greater flexibility in initiating post-op rehab based on individual patient presentation and intraoperative findings, rather than adhering to prolonged immobilization.

items.title: Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) to Recover Arm Activity After Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A single-blind, randomized, sham-controlled trial (n=30) found that home-based myoelectric interface for neurorehabilitation (MINT) significantly reduced abnormal muscle co-activation and improved arm activity in moderately-to-severely impaired chronic stroke survivors.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 显示，可穿戴式肌电接口神经康复（MINT）设备能显著改善慢性卒中患者的异常肌肉共激活和上肢功能。这提示你，MINT 或许可以作为一种有效的家庭康复工具，在门诊治疗之外提供持续的、以减少共激活为目标的训练。
items.titleZh: 可穿戴式肌电接口神经康复（MINT）用于卒中后手臂活动恢复的随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项单盲、随机、假对照试验（n=30）发现，居家肌电接口神经康复（MINT）能显著减少中重度慢性卒中幸存者的异常肌肉共激活，并改善手臂活动。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT indicates that the Wearable Myoelectric Interface for Neurorehabilitation (MINT) device significantly improves abnormal muscle co-activation and arm function in chronic stroke survivors. This suggests MINT could be an effective home-based rehabilitation tool, offering continuous, co-activation-reduction focused training beyond outpatient therapy.

items.title: Comparative effectiveness of supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches on pain and function in patients with chronic pain in primary care: a retrospective observational study.
items.summary: A retrospective observational study found that supervised individual, group-based, and mixed physiotherapy approaches showed comparable effectiveness on pain and function in primary care patients with chronic pain.
items.curatedReason: 这项回顾性研究表明，对于原发性慢性疼痛患者，团体物理治疗在疼痛和功能改善方面与个体化治疗效果相当。在资源有限或需要扩大服务范围时，将团体治疗纳入你的实践是可行且有效的选项。
items.titleZh: 原发性慢性疼痛患者个体、团体及混合物理治疗方案对疼痛和功能影响的比较：一项回顾性观察性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项回顾性观察性研究发现，在原发性慢性疼痛患者中，个体、团体和混合物理治疗方案在改善疼痛和功能方面的有效性相当。
items.curatedReasonEn: This retrospective observational study indicates that group-based physiotherapy is comparable to individual sessions for pain and function in primary care patients with chronic pain. Consider integrating group therapy into your practice, especially when facing resource constraints or aiming to expand service reach.

items.title: The Effect of Duration of Supervised Rehabilitation on Outcomes Following Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction: A Systematic Review.
items.summary: A systematic review aimed to elucidate the association between the duration of supervised rehabilitation and functional outcomes, as well as re-injury risk, after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR).
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述强调 ACLR 术后康复监督时长与结局的关联性尚不明确。这意味着你应将重心放在个性化功能目标上，而非仅仅关注康复总时长，并持续评估患者进展以适时调整方案。
items.titleZh: 监督下康复时长对前交叉韧带重建术后结局影响的系统综述
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述旨在阐明前交叉韧带重建术（ACLR）后监督下康复时长与功能结局及再损伤风险之间的关联。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review highlights the unclear association between the duration of supervised rehabilitation and outcomes following ACLR. This means you should prioritize individualized functional goals over arbitrary total rehabilitation time, continually assessing patient progress to adjust protocols as needed.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test in individuals with stroke: A systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test (Mini-BESTest) cutoff values in individuals with stroke.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-BESTest 在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性。你应该根据临床目的选择合适的量表：BBS 适用于一般平衡能力评估，而 Mini-BESTest 可能在识别特定平衡障碍方面更具优势，并留意其推荐的临界值。
items.titleZh: Berg 平衡量表和 Mini-BESTest 在卒中患者中的诊断和预后准确性：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析调查了 Berg 平衡量表（BBS）和 Mini-Balance Evaluation Systems Test（Mini-BESTest）在卒中患者中临界值的诊断和预后准确性。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis evaluates the diagnostic and prognostic accuracy of the Berg Balance Scale (BBS) and Mini-BESTest in individuals with stroke. You should select the appropriate scale based on clinical purpose: BBS for general balance assessment, while Mini-BESTest may offer advantages in identifying specific balance impairments, paying close attention to their recommended cutoff values.

items.title: Functional stratification reveals speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age.
items.summary: This study examined whether stratifying older adults by functional status using the Short Physical Performance Battery (SPPB) could reveal speed-independent gait impairments beyond chronological age, using kinematic profiling.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，通过功能分层（如 SPPB）来评估老年人步态障碍，能够发现独立于年龄的速度无关性功能损害。这意味着在老年康复中，你应超越单纯的计时测试，更深入地评估步态生物力学，以早期识别并干预功能衰退。
items.titleZh: 功能分层揭示了独立于年龄的速度无关性步态障碍
items.summaryZh: 这项研究旨在通过运动学分析，探讨根据短期身体表现量表（SPPB）将老年人进行功能分层，能否揭示独立于年龄的速度无关性步态障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study indicates that functional stratification (e.g., using SPPB) for gait impairment in older adults can reveal speed-independent functional deficits beyond chronological age. This means in geriatric rehabilitation, you should move beyond simple timed tests and delve deeper into gait biomechanics to identify and intervene in functional decline earlier.

items.title: Dry needling and muscle mechanical properties in myofascial trigger points: a systematic review and meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis evaluated the effects of dry needling on myofascial mechanical properties in adults with active or latent myofascial trigger points, comparing it with sham or noninvasive treatments.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了干针疗法对肌筋膜触发点机械特性的影响。虽然它证实了干针可以改善这些特性，但在实践中你仍需结合疼痛缓解和功能改善的长期结局来评估其临床价值，并谨慎选择患者。
items.titleZh: 干针疗法对肌筋膜触发点肌肉机械特性的影响：系统综述和荟萃分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和荟萃分析评估了干针疗法对活动性或潜伏性肌筋膜触发点成年患者肌筋膜机械特性的影响，并将其与假治疗或非侵入性治疗进行比较。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis assesses the effects of dry needling on the mechanical properties of myofascial trigger points. While it confirms dry needling can improve these properties, in practice, you still need to evaluate its clinical value in conjunction with long-term outcomes for pain relief and functional improvement, and carefully select patients.
items.journal: The Journal of manual & manipulative therapy

items.title: Physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to the implementation of high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain: a scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies.
items.summary: A scoping review and narrative synthesis of 37 studies identified physiotherapist-related barriers and enablers to implementing high-value physiotherapy, such as exercise, for chronic pain, noting that low-value treatments like manual therapy remain common.
items.curatedReason: 这份范围性综述揭示了物理治疗师在为慢性疼痛患者实施高价值物理治疗时的障碍和促进因素。作为管理者，这能帮你识别并解决内部实践中的瓶颈；作为临床医生，这提醒你自我反思，将更多证据支持的干预融入日常。
items.titleZh: 物理治疗师在慢性疼痛高价值物理治疗实施中的障碍与促进因素：37 项研究的范围性综述和叙述性综合
items.summaryZh: 一项对 37 项研究的范围性综述和叙述性综合确定了物理治疗师在为慢性疼痛患者实施高价值物理治疗（如运动）方面的障碍和促进因素，并指出低价值治疗（如手法治疗）仍然普遍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This scoping review highlights barriers and enablers for physical therapists in delivering high-value physiotherapy for chronic pain. As a manager, this helps identify and address bottlenecks within your practice. As a clinician, it prompts self-reflection on integrating more evidence-based interventions into daily practice.

items.title: Goal attainment scaling for patients with chronic low back pain receiving physical therapist care: a feasibility and reliability study.
items.summary: A feasibility and reliability study found that a goal attainment scaling application for chronic low back pain patients (GAS-Back) is a viable tool for capturing patient's individual experience and goals.
items.curatedReason: 这项研究表明，目标达成量表（GAS-Back）对于慢性下腰痛患者来说是可行的且可靠的测量工具。在临床实践中，你应该考虑将其纳入评估，以更好地捕捉患者的个性化目标和体验，补充传统量表的不足。
items.titleZh: 慢性下腰痛患者接受物理治疗时目标达成量表的可行性和可靠性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项可行性和可靠性研究发现，针对慢性下腰痛患者的目标达成量表（GAS-Back）是捕捉患者个体体验和目标的有效工具。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study suggests that Goal Attainment Scaling (GAS-Back) is a feasible and reliable outcome measure for patients with chronic low back pain. You should consider incorporating it into your clinical assessments to better capture individualized patient goals and experiences, complementing traditional measures.

items.title: Prevalence of knee pain and factors influencing its risk in ambulatory chronic stroke survivors.
items.summary: A cross-sectional study of 212 ambulatory chronic stroke survivors in Vietnam found a high prevalence of knee pain, identifying demographics and gait alterations as associated factors.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对慢性卒中幸存者的研究揭示了膝关节疼痛的患病率及其影响因素。在评估和制定卒中患者康复计划时，你必须关注并筛查膝关节疼痛，因为这会严重限制他们的步态功能和生活质量。
items.titleZh: 步行慢性卒中幸存者膝关节疼痛的患病率及其影响因素
items.summaryZh: 一项对 212 名越南步行慢性卒中幸存者的横断面研究发现，膝关节疼痛患病率很高，并确定了人口统计学和步态改变是相关因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This study on chronic stroke survivors reveals the prevalence of knee pain and its influencing factors. When assessing and planning rehabilitation for stroke patients, you must screen for and address knee pain, as it significantly limits gait function and quality of life.

items.title: Barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among individuals with spinal cord injury in China: A qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study explored barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity among 20 community-dwelling adults with spinal cord injury in China, using the COM-B model.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对中国脊髓损伤（SCI）患者的定性研究揭示了影响他们休闲体育活动（LTPA）的障碍和促进因素。在为这些患者设计康复和社区参与方案时，你必须考虑文化和环境特异性，以提高干预的依从性和有效性。
items.titleZh: 中国脊髓损伤患者休闲体育活动障碍和促进因素的质性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项质性研究使用 COM-B 模型，探索了中国 20 名社区居住脊髓损伤成人休闲体育活动的障碍和促进因素。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study on individuals with spinal cord injury (SCI) in China reveals barriers and facilitators to leisure-time physical activity (LTPA). When designing rehabilitation and community engagement programs for these patients, you must consider cultural and environmental specificities to enhance intervention adherence and effectiveness.

items.title: Healthcare professionals' perception of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in stroke patients with and without aphasia - a national survey.
items.summary: A national survey investigated healthcare professionals' perceptions of prevalence and assessment of mental ill-health in stroke patients with and without aphasia in Swedish stroke care.
items.curatedReason: 这项全国性调查揭示了医疗专业人员对卒中患者（包括失语症患者）心理健康评估的认知和实践现状。作为康复团队的一员，你必须积极参与识别和评估卒中患者的心理健康问题，尤其对于失语症患者，应寻求或开发适应性评估工具，弥补现有资源的不足。
items.titleZh: 医疗专业人员对卒中失语和非失语患者心理疾病患病率和评估的认知：一项全国性调查
items.summaryZh: 一项全国性调查研究了瑞典卒中护理中，医疗专业人员对卒中失语和非失语患者心理疾病患病率和评估的认知。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey reveals healthcare professionals' perceptions and practices regarding mental health assessment in stroke patients, including those with aphasia. As a member of the rehabilitation team, you must actively participate in identifying and assessing mental health issues in stroke patients. For those with aphasia, in particular, you should seek or develop adaptive assessment tools to address existing resource gaps.

items.title: Exploring psychological flexibility processes in adults with spinal cord injury: a qualitative study.
items.summary: A qualitative study examined lived experiences of psychological flexibility and its processes among adults with spinal cord injury, a capacity linked to better mental health.
items.curatedReason: 这项定性研究深入探讨了脊髓损伤患者心理柔韧性的生活体验。理解这些过程能帮助你更好地将接受与承诺疗法（ACT）等心理干预融入康复计划，以提升患者应对困难内部体验的能力，促进价值观导向的行动。
items.titleZh: 探索脊髓损伤成年患者的心理柔韧性过程：一项定性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项定性研究考察了脊髓损伤成年患者心理柔韧性及其过程的生活体验，这种能力与更好的心理健康相关。
items.curatedReasonEn: This qualitative study explores the lived experiences of psychological flexibility in individuals with spinal cord injury. Understanding these processes can help you better integrate psychological interventions like Acceptance and Commitment Therapy (ACT) into rehabilitation plans, enhancing patients' ability to navigate difficult internal experiences and promote value-driven actions.

items.title: Accelerometry-derived physical activity following Achilles tendon rupture: A prospective cohort study.
items.summary: A prospective cohort study (n=42) investigated accelerometry-derived physical activity during the first year after Achilles tendon rupture, exploring its relationship with patient-reported outcomes.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究使用加速度计评估了跟腱断裂后患者在一年内的身体活动水平。你需要了解，即使患者自我报告结局良好，客观活动水平可能仍低于预期，这提示你在康复后期应更强调客观评估，并针对性地提高患者的日常活动量。
items.titleZh: 跟腱断裂后通过加速度计测量的身体活动：一项前瞻性队列研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列研究（n=42）调查了跟腱断裂后第一年内通过加速度计测量的身体活动，并探讨了其与患者报告结局的关系。
items.curatedReasonEn: This prospective cohort study used accelerometry to assess physical activity levels in patients after Achilles tendon rupture over one year. You need to understand that even with good patient-reported outcomes, objective activity levels might be lower than expected. This suggests you should place more emphasis on objective assessments in later-stage rehabilitation and specifically target increasing patients' daily activity.

items.title: Rehabilitation Protocols Following Patellar Instability Surgery: A Structured Review of Published Recommendations and AI Generated Guidance.
items.summary: A structured review examined postoperative rehabilitation protocols after surgery for patellar instability, including MPFLR, TTO, trochleoplasty, and combined procedures, and compared published recommendations with AI-generated guidance.
items.curatedReason: 这份综述对比了髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案以及 AI 生成的指南。AI 可能会成为你未来实践中的辅助工具，但在目前阶段，你仍需审慎评估其建议，并以循证医学和临床经验为核心来制定康复计划。
items.titleZh: 髌骨不稳手术后的康复方案：已发布建议和 AI 生成指南的结构化综述
items.summaryZh: 一项结构化综述检查了髌骨不稳手术（包括 MPFLR、TTO、滑车成形术和联合手术）后的康复方案，并对比了已发布建议和 AI 生成的指南。
items.curatedReasonEn: This review compares rehabilitation protocols following patellar instability surgery with AI-generated guidance. While AI may become a future practice aid, at this stage, you still need to critically evaluate its suggestions and base rehabilitation plans primarily on evidence-based medicine and clinical experience.

items.title: Lung Boost Trainer Versus Incentive Spirometer on Pulmonary Function Post COVID Hemiplegic Cerebral Palsy Children; Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial compared the efficacy of a Lung Boost Trainer versus an incentive spirometer on pulmonary function in COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy children, a population often presenting with impaired pulmonary function due to reduced chest wall movement and weak respiratory muscles.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 表明，在治疗 COVID 后偏瘫型脑瘫儿童的肺功能障碍时，Lung Boost 训练器可能优于传统诱导性肺活量计。如果你在儿科康复中遇到这类患儿，可以考虑将 Lung Boost 训练器作为一种更有效的呼吸功能训练工具。
items.titleZh: Lung Boost 训练器与诱导性肺活量计对 COVID 偏瘫型脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响：随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验比较了 Lung Boost 训练器与诱导性肺活量计对 COVID 偏瘫型脑瘫儿童肺功能的影响，这类儿童常因胸壁活动受限和呼吸肌无力导致肺功能受损。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT suggests that the Lung Boost Trainer may be superior to conventional incentive spirometry for pulmonary dysfunction in children with post-COVID hemiplegic cerebral palsy. If you encounter such pediatric patients in rehabilitation, consider the Lung Boost Trainer as a potentially more effective tool for respiratory function training.
items.journal: Physiotherapy research international : the journal for researchers and clinicians in physical therapy

items.title: Community-Based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) Program for Youth with Cerebral Palsy: A Prospective Cohort Pilot Study.
items.summary: A pre-post prospective cohort pilot study (n=12) found that a 12-week, goal-focused, community-based power-training program for youth with cerebral palsy improved goal performance, satisfaction, attainment, gross motor function (gait speed, walking capacity), and anaerobic capacity.
items.curatedReason: 这项前瞻性队列研究的初步结果显示，基于社区的阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）计划能改善脑瘫青少年的目标表现、满意度、粗大运动功能和无氧能力。你可以将 RIPT 视为一种在社区环境中有效提升脑瘫青少年功能和参与度的策略。
items.titleZh: 社区阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）计划对脑瘫青少年的影响：一项前瞻性队列预试验研究
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性队列预试验研究（n=12）发现，为期 12 周、以目标为导向的社区阻力强化个人训练（RIPT）计划改善了脑瘫青少年的目标表现、满意度、达成度、粗大运动功能（步速、步行能力）和无氧能力。
items.curatedReasonEn: The preliminary results of this prospective cohort study indicate that a community-based Resistance Intensive Personal Training (RIPT) program improves goal performance, satisfaction, gross motor function, and anaerobic capacity in youth with cerebral palsy. You can consider RIPT as an effective strategy to enhance function and participation for youth with cerebral palsy in a community setting.

items.title: Evolving Demographics and Injury Characteristics of US Traumatic Spinal Cord Injury, 1972-2024.
items.summary: A cross-sectional analysis of 37,866 participants from 31 US Spinal Cord Injury Model Systems centers examined evolving demographics and injury characteristics of new traumatic spinal cord injury cases from 1972 to 2024.
items.curatedReason: 这项对美国创伤性脊髓损伤（tSCI）人口特征的长期分析（1972-2024）揭示了患者年龄和受伤机制的变化。作为物理治疗师，你需要了解这些趋势，以便调整你的临床实践和康复计划，更好地满足老年 tSCI 患者的复杂需求，并关注预防策略。
items.titleZh: 1972-2024 年美国创伤性脊髓损伤的人口特征和损伤特点演变
items.summaryZh: 一项对来自 31 个美国脊髓损伤示范系统中心的 37,866 名参与者的横断面分析，考察了 1972 年至 2024 年新增创伤性脊髓损伤病例的人口统计学和损伤特征的演变。
items.curatedReasonEn: This long-term analysis (1972-2024) of US traumatic spinal cord injury (tSCI) demographics reveals shifts in patient age and injury mechanisms. As a physical therapist, you need to understand these trends to adapt your clinical practice and rehabilitation plans, better meeting the complex needs of older tSCI patients and focusing on preventive strategies.
items.journal: Archives of physical medicine and rehabilitation

items.title: Rehabilitation Utilizing Blood Flow Restriction Following Surgical Repair of a Bankart Lesion with a Buford Complex in an Elite High School Football Player: A Case Report.
items.summary: A case report describes rehabilitation utilizing blood flow restriction following surgical repair of a Bankart lesion with a Buford complex in an elite high school football player, highlighting unique anatomical and rehabilitative considerations.
items.curatedReason: 这份病例报告描述了在复杂肩关节损伤（Bankart 损伤伴 Buford 复合体）的精英橄榄球运动员术后，结合血流限制训练的康复方案。这为你提供了在处理罕见复杂病理时，考虑将 BFR 作为强化早期恢复手段的初步参考，但要记住这只是一个病例，需谨慎推广。
items.titleZh: 精英高中橄榄球运动员 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体手术修复后采用血流限制训练的康复：病例报告
items.summaryZh: 一份病例报告描述了一名精英高中橄榄球运动员 Bankart 损伤合并 Buford 复合体手术修复后，采用血流限制训练的康复过程，强调了独特的解剖学和康复考量。
items.curatedReasonEn: This case report details a rehabilitation protocol, including blood flow restriction training, for an elite high school football player with a complex Bankart lesion and Buford complex after surgery. It offers initial insights for considering BFR as an early recovery enhancement in rare, complex shoulder pathologies, but remember this is a single case and generalization should be cautious.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: Early Neuromuscular and Co-activation Patterns After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction In Males: A Case-control Exploratory Feasibility Study.
items.summary: An exploratory feasibility study of 12 males found that arthrogenic muscle inhibition (AMI) and excessive hamstring co-activation are major barriers to muscle recovery early after anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR).
items.curatedReason: 这项初步研究探讨了 ACLR 术后早期神经肌肉和共激活模式。虽然样本量小，但它提示你在术后早期要关注腘绳肌过度共激活可能对股四头肌恢复造成的负面影响，这有助于你优化早期康复策略，避免潜在的代偿模式。
items.titleZh: 男性前交叉韧带重建术后早期神经肌肉和共激活模式：一项病例对照探索性可行性研究
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 12 名男性的探索性可行性研究发现，关节源性肌肉抑制（AMI）和过度的腘绳肌共激活是前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）术后早期肌肉恢复的主要障碍。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study investigates early neuromuscular and co-activation patterns after ACLR. Although the sample size is small, it suggests you should be mindful of potential negative impacts from excessive hamstring co-activation on quadriceps recovery in the early post-operative period. This insight can help optimize your early rehabilitation strategies to prevent compensatory patterns.
items.journal: International journal of sports physical therapy

items.title: National survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia.
items.summary: A cross-sectional online survey (June-August 2023) described stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia, assessing service characteristics including staffing, session frequency, duration, and insurance coverage.
items.curatedReason: 这项针对印度尼西亚卒中康复服务的全国性调查提供了当地服务特点的快照。如果你关注国际康复实践，这份报告能让你了解东南亚地区卒中康复服务的现状、人员配备和保险覆盖情况，从而在跨文化合作或政策比较时更有依据。
items.titleZh: 印度尼西亚卒中康复服务的全国性调查
items.summaryZh: 一项横断面在线调查（2023 年 6 月至 8 月）描述了印度尼西亚的卒中康复服务，评估了包括人员配置、治疗频率、持续时间及保险覆盖在内的服务特征。
items.curatedReasonEn: This national survey of stroke rehabilitation services in Indonesia offers a snapshot of local service characteristics. If you follow international rehabilitation practices, this report provides insights into the current state, staffing, and insurance coverage of stroke rehabilitation services in Southeast Asia, which can inform cross-cultural collaborations or policy comparisons.

items.title: Are There Sex Disparities in Return to Sport After Anterior Cruciate Ligament Reconstruction? A Systematic Review and Exploratory Meta-analysis.
items.summary: A systematic review and exploratory meta-analysis of 30 studies found that female athletes may have lower return-to-sport rates after primary anterior cruciate ligament reconstruction (ACLR) compared to male athletes.
items.curatedReason: 系统综述和 Meta 分析揭示了 ACLR 后女性运动员重返运动率低于男性。这意味着你在 ACLR 后康复中，需要特别关注女性患者的潜在性别差异，并调整重返运动策略，可能需要更针对性的心理和社会支持。
items.titleZh: 前交叉韧带重建后重返运动是否存在性别差异？一项系统综述和探索性 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项对 30 项研究的系统综述和探索性 Meta 分析发现，女性运动员在原发性前交叉韧带重建（ACLR）后重返运动的比例可能低于男性运动员。
items.curatedReasonEn: A systematic review and meta-analysis reveal lower return-to-sport rates in female athletes after ACLR compared to males. This means you need to pay special attention to potential sex disparities in female patients during ACLR rehabilitation and adjust return-to-sport strategies, potentially requiring more targeted psychological and social support.
items.journal: The American journal of sports medicine

items.title: Smartphone-Based Semi-Immersive Virtual Reality Enhances Upper Extremity Function in Subacute Stroke: A Randomized Controlled Trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial found that smartphone-based semi-immersive virtual reality augmented with conventional physical therapy significantly improved upper extremity function in individuals with subacute stroke compared to conventional therapy alone (p < 0.01 for Fugl-Meyer Assessment-Upper Extremity scores).
items.curatedReason: 智能手机半沉浸式 VR 在亚急性卒中上肢康复中展现出显著优势，比单纯常规 PT 效果更好。这意味着你可以把这类低成本 VR 方案纳入你的卒中康复工具箱，尤其对于资源有限的患者。
items.titleZh: 智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术在亚急性卒中患者上肢功能康复中的应用：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项随机对照试验发现，与单纯常规物理治疗相比，结合智能手机半沉浸式虚拟现实技术能显著改善亚急性卒中患者的上肢功能（Fugl-Meyer 上肢评定分数 p < 0.01）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Smartphone-based semi-immersive VR shows significant advantages in subacute stroke upper extremity rehabilitation, outperforming conventional PT alone. This means you can integrate such low-cost VR solutions into your stroke rehabilitation toolkit, especially for resource-limited patients.

items.title: School-based Motor Skill Interventions for Children and Adolescents with Developmental Coordination Disorder: A Systematic Review and Meta-Analysis
items.summary: A systematic review and meta-analysis investigated the effects of school-based interventions on motor performance in children and adolescents with developmental coordination disorder.
items.curatedReason: 这项系统综述和 Meta 分析证实了学校体育技能干预对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年运动表现的有效性。这意味着你在儿童康复中，可以更有信心地与学校合作，推广基于学校的干预方案。
items.titleZh: 针对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年的学校体育技能干预：一项系统综述和 Meta 分析
items.summaryZh: 一项系统综述和 Meta 分析调查了学校体育技能干预对发育性协调障碍儿童和青少年运动表现的影响。
items.curatedReasonEn: This systematic review and meta-analysis confirms the effectiveness of school-based motor skill interventions for improving motor performance in children and adolescents with developmental coordination disorder. This means you can collaborate with schools with greater confidence in pediatric rehabilitation to promote school-based intervention programs.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation

items.title: The impact of a brief online education intervention on the knowledge, attitudes and beliefs of qualified physiotherapists about chronic low back pain: Pre- and post-intervention survey.
items.summary: A pre- and post-intervention survey found that a brief online education program improved qualified physiotherapists' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs about chronic low back pain, shifting them towards a biopsychosocial approach.
items.curatedReason: 在线教育干预能短期改善物理治疗师对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念。但这个研究是前瞻性、非随机的，且没有长期随访，所以不能直接推广到临床实践改变。
items.titleZh: 在线教育干预对物理治疗师慢性腰痛知识、态度和信念的影响：干预前后调查
items.summaryZh: 一项前瞻性调查显示，简短的在线教育课程能改善物理治疗师对慢性腰痛的知识、态度和信念，促使他们转向生物心理社会模型。
items.curatedReasonEn: Online education can improve PTs' knowledge, attitudes, and beliefs regarding chronic low back pain in the short term. However, this study is prospective, non-randomized, and lacks long-term follow-up, so it cannot be directly generalized to clinical practice changes.
items.journal: The South African journal of physiotherapy

items.title: Effectiveness of passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on functional recovery and neuroplasticity post-stroke: A randomized controlled trial.
items.summary: A randomized controlled trial with 48 subacute stroke patients compared passive vs. assistive robotic gait training, showing both modes improved lower limb motor function, with differences in neuroplasticity mechanisms.
items.curatedReason: 这项 RCT 比较了被动式和辅助式机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响。如果你在临床中使用机器人辅助，这份研究为你提供了不同模式选择的证据支持，以优化下肢功能恢复。
items.titleZh: 被动式与辅助式机器人步态训练对卒中后功能恢复和神经可塑性的影响：一项随机对照试验
items.summaryZh: 一项纳入 48 例亚急性卒中患者的随机对照试验比较了被动式与辅助式机器人步态训练，结果显示两种模式均能改善下肢运动功能，但在神经可塑性机制上存在差异。
items.curatedReasonEn: This RCT compared passive vs. assistive robotic gait training on post-stroke functional recovery and neuroplasticity. If you use robotic assistance in your clinic, this study provides evidence to support different mode selections for optimizing lower limb functional recovery.

items.title: Ischemic preconditioning alters gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis.
items.summary: A study with 30 older adults with knee osteoarthritis found that a single session of ischemic preconditioning significantly altered gait mechanics, specifically increasing knee flexion excursion (p = 0.04).
items.curatedReason: 缺血预处理在膝骨关节炎老年患者中能改变步态力学。这提供了一种非运动干预的潜在辅助策略，但还需要更多研究来确定其长期疗效和临床应用方案。
items.titleZh: 缺血预处理改变膝骨关节炎老年患者的步态力学
items.summaryZh: 一项针对 30 名膝骨关节炎老年患者的研究发现，单次缺血预处理显著改变了步态力学，特别是增加了膝关节屈曲幅度（p = 0.04）。
items.curatedReasonEn: Ischemic preconditioning can alter gait mechanics in older adults with knee osteoarthritis. This offers a potential adjunctive strategy for non-exercise interventions, but further research is needed to determine its long-term efficacy and clinical application protocols.

items.title: Characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity. An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial
items.summary: An exploratory cross-sectional study from the MOBILIZE trial investigated characteristics and reasons for non-attendance at exercise therapy and self-management support among patients with multimorbidity.
items.curatedReason: 对多重共病患者运动疗法和自我管理支持的依从性进行探索性研究。如果你在管理多重共病患者时遇到依从性问题，这份研究为你提供了理解非依从性原因的视角，从而更好地调整干预策略。
items.titleZh: 多重共病患者运动疗法和自我管理支持依从性的特征与原因：一项 MOBILIZE 试验的探索性横断面研究
items.summaryZh: MOBILIZE 试验的一项探索性横断面研究调查了多重共病患者未能参与运动疗法和自我管理支持的特征及原因。
items.curatedReasonEn: This exploratory study investigates adherence to exercise therapy and self-management support among multimorbidity patients. If you encounter adherence issues with multimorbidity patients, this research offers insights into reasons for non-adherence, helping you better adjust intervention strategies.
items.journal: Archives of Physical Medicine and Rehabilitation
